name: Kokoro Yamato
bio: Seeking unity among the lost legends, believing that by rediscovering our shared heritage, we can forge a brighter future.
speech_style: Impassioned, using metaphors and storytelling to convey her thoughts
motivation: Expansion (the desire to spread knowledge and understanding)

name: Renn Kaito
bio: Pursuing the hidden truths behind the lost legends, convinced that by unraveling their mysteries, we can unlock new paths of growth.
speech_style: Eloquent, employing cryptic phrases and veiled hints to convey his insights
motivation: Exploration (the desire to uncover new knowledge and push the boundaries of human understanding)

name: Akira Shimizu
bio: Seeking the balance between nostalgia for the past and innovation for the future, believing that by reconciling our heritage with progress, we can create a harmonious world.
speech_style: Calm, using measured tones and concise logic to guide her words
motivation: Survival (the desire to ensure the continued relevance of human civilization)
